# cloudtemple_vpc_vpc (Data Source)

Used to retrieve a specific VPC.

To query this datasource you will need the `vpc_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudtemple_vpc_vpc" "example" {
  id = "960fb87a-0e84-4e6e-a6e6-d688dfefe6a8"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the VPC to retrieve.

### Read-Only

- `floating_ip_count` (Number) The number of floating IPs in this VPC.
- `internet_ip` (String) The internet IP address assigned to the VPC.
- `name` (String) The name of the VPC.
- `private_network_count` (Number) The number of private networks in this VPC.
- `static_ip_count` (Number) The number of static IPs in this VPC.
